description: 把 learning_library prototype 從 app seed 遷移到 content-ko learning overlay，並建立 frontend 可用的 build artifact。

tasks.desc: Freeze source/sentence/knowledge/topic/vocab_set/links contracts based on the already-validated app prototype.
Define content-ko overlay directory layout under content/core/learning_library and content/i18n/zh_tw/learning_library.
Define the first migration pack mapping plan: video 79Pwq7MTUPE, dialogue A1-01, article A1-01 intro, A1-1 knowledge items, and time topic family.
Execute the actual content migration: move verified items into content-ko overlay directories.
Execute second migration pack (Pack 002): 10 items including object particle (~을/를), locatives (~에/에서), and basic connectors (그리고, 그래서, 하지만, etc).

Define artifact outputs and naming: learning_library_sources_index, learning_library_knowledge, learning_library_topics, learning_library_links, learning_library_vocab_sets, and learning_library_sentences.
[Pipeline] Implement merge strategy for core structure and i18n content (knowledge/topics/vocab_sets).
[Pipeline] Implement sources_index extraction from video/dialogue/article core sources.
[Pipeline] Implement links aggregation and referential integrity validation (all types: video, dialogue, article).
[Pipeline] Implement sentence payload extraction and normalization (text, translation, refs, timestamps) from video/dialogue/article sources.
[Pipeline] Emit finalized JSON artifacts (6 files) following Learning Library v0 artifact schema.
[Contract] Freeze Learning Library vNext packaging: target-language core artifacts plus support-language i18n artifacts, including field ownership boundaries.
[Pipeline] Replace localized single-bundle output with core/i18n pack emission plan and output naming for target/support language pairs.
[Frontend Contract] Define frontend composition intake contract: load target core + selected support-language i18n without reintroducing single-bundle finalized artifacts.
Define the staging frontend intake switch in lingo-frontend-web so learning library artifact mode can run alongside temporary seed mode for comparison.
Wire dialogue/video artifact loaders for staging recovery and surface staging_only, readiness_flag, and segmentation_status as intake/debug metadata without changing the artifact contract.
Run parity verification for dialogue/video source list/detail flows: artifact mode must be visible, intakeable, and sample-verifiable against the prototype seed path.
Record the staging recovery mismatch list and acceptance gate, explicitly allowing non-prod/staging_only status while keeping production promotion out of scope.
Plan the handoff from content-first prototype to future knowledge-first lab once artifact mode is stable.
[Deferred] Define minimal custom-source import/export contract; work is deferred until canonical sentence bank and slot bank schemas are fully stabilized and frozen.
